note: MDCC-02 pinned-class map. Each entry overrides the udc_hint-derived pinnedClassBase for one concept. v1 corrects the UDC-class-8 conflation: UDC merges 'Language. Linguistics. Literature' so every language concept inherited a hint of 8 and bucketed to MDCC 800 (Literature); MDCC's spine separates 400 (Language and communication) from 800 (Literature). These pins move the reviewed linguistics cohort 800 -> 400. The 'rationale' field documents each editorial decision and is ignored by the loader.
